data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for settlement run windows.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Settlement run windows with draft/running/completed lifecycle', but the provided evidence does not include any checks or data related to the lifecycle of settlement run windows. The evidence focuses on various booking and financial outputs but lacks any mention of settlement run windows or their statuses. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to satisfy the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of settlement run windows with draft/running/completed lifecycle.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for settlement run windows lifecycle
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete checks that verify the lifecycle of settlement run windows.
